parameters.content: Sprint 15 - imported via POST /api/n8n/workflows/import/appointment-reminder, then triggered via POST /api/n8n/workflows/appointment-reminder/trigger, which calls this workflow's Webhook node. Still placeholder business logic (no downstream nodes) - only the trigger mechanism is real.

meta.name: Appointment Reminder
meta.description: Placeholder for a future appointment reminder workflow. Trigger mechanism (webhook) is real; no business logic implemented.
